title: Halimocnemis mamamensis

taxonomy: Halimocnemis mamamensis is classified as a species within the genus Halimocnemis, which belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. The genus Halimocnemis is part of the order Caryophyllales. Halimocnemis mamamensis is a flowering plant that is native to the Middle East. Further classification includes it being a member of the class Magnoliopsida and the phylum Angiospermophyta. It is a type of succulent plant that grows in arid regions.
